param.name: robot_description
param.command: $(find xacro)/xacro '$(find ur_gripper_gazebo)/urdf/dual_ur_gripper_85.xacro' joint_limit_params:='$(arg joint_limit_params)' kinematics_params:='$(find ur_description)/config/$(arg ur_robot)/default_kinematics.yaml' physical_params:='$(find ur_description)/config/$(arg ur_robot)/physical_parameters.yaml' visual_params:='$(find ur_description)/config/$(arg ur_robot)/visual_parameters.yaml' transmission_hw_interface:=$(arg transmission_hw_interface) safety_limits:=$(arg safety_limits) safety_pos_margin:=$(arg safety_pos_margin) safety_k_position:=$(arg safety_k_position)
